REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (751 45th Ave., San Francisco, Ca 94121)
Off Calendar Aug-23-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Called with case no. 286976. Doug Penson appearing for petitioner. Sale is for 50% undivided interest in each case totaling 100% interest. Bid is increased to $711,850.00 for 100% interest. Additional bond if required for both cases. Counsel will report back to court with the amount of additional bond. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Teena Paxton CSR#1558. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.
At 11:20am, counsel reports to court the amount of the addtional bond should be $325,000.00. Additional Bond in the amount of $325,000.00 is required. Order signed.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-17-2006 Granted Per Written Order
